name: ensemble
description: Ensemble — Cursor Agent and Gemini CLI plugins for Claude Code

scripts.lint:json: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');function walk(d){for(const e of fs.readdirSync(d,{withFileTypes:true})){if(e.name==='.git'||e.name==='node_modules')continue;const p=path.join(d,e.name);if(e.isDirectory())walk(p);else if(e.name.endsWith('.json'))JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8'));}}walk('.');console.log('all json valid');"
